{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description= Hailing from the witch dimension, the dark art crystal combined the hand of the witch and the Snail Shell to obtain the witch's power, for scratching.
|affct=ART
|hard=RUSH
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=2776
|relic1=Requiem
|relic2=Blood of Dracula
|relic3=Soul Stone
|relic4=Glass Coffin
|relic5=Ranjyatai Incense
}}
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=6
|fire=7
|wind=7
|form=Demon
|element=Fire
|realm=Hellas
|orangehard=HP
}}
